case_title: MARK JAMES ESHBAUGH VS. INTERNATIONAL MARINE FUELS GROUP, INC., A

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESHBAUGH, MARK JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL MARINE FUELS GROUP, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA SAN FRANCISCO PETROLEUM CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESHBAUGH, MARK JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL MARINE FUELS GROUP, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA SAN FRANCISCO PETROLEUM CO. $6,527.44 PRINCIPAL, $17.17 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,769.61, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
